english: Iraqi Prime Minister Ali al-Zaidi is visiting Tehran following a productive trip to Washington, marking his attempt to navigate the complex rivalry between the US and Iran. The new leader is aiming to shift Iraq's foreign policy toward greater economic cooperation while asserting more independence from both nations. By balancing these major relationships, he hopes to transition Iraq away from being a mere battleground for foreign interests toward becoming a self-reliant regional partner.
amharic: የኢራቅ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር አሊ አል-ዛይዲ ከዋሽንግተን ጉብኝታቸው በኋላ ወደ ቴህራን በማቅናት በአሜሪካ እና በኢራን መካከል ያለውን ውስብስብ ግንኙነት ለማመጣጠን እየጣሩ ነው። አዲሱ መሪ የኢራቅን የውጭ ግንኙነት በኢኮኖሚ ትብብር ላይ እንዲያተኩር እና ከሁለቱም ሀገራት አንጻራዊ ነፃነት እንዲኖረው ለማድረግ እየሰሩ ነው። በዚህ ሚዛናዊ አካሄድም ኢራቅ ለውጭ ተጽእኖዎች መጫወቻ ከመሆን ይልቅ የራሷን ክልላዊ አቅም የምታጠናክር ሀገር እንድትሆን ይፈልጋሉ።
oromo: Muummeen Ministiraa Iraaq Ali al-Zaidi daawwannaa Washington booda gara Tehraan qajeelaniiru; kunis dhiibbaa fi walitti bu'iinsa Ameerikaa fi Iraan gidduu jiru madaaluuf yaalii godhanidha. Hoggantoonni haaraan kun siyaasa alaa Iraaq gara walitti dhufeenya dinagdee fi bilisummaa caaluu akka fideeffatuuf hojjachaa jiru. Akkaataa kanaan, Iraaq dhiibbaa alaa jalaa bahuun akka biyya tokkotti sadarkaa naannootti of danda'uuf kan isaan kaayyeffatanidha.

title: Several killed as Ukraine, Russia trade attacks deep behind the front line
english: Russia and Ukraine have engaged in a series of cross-border strikes that have claimed at least eight lives, including a child. These long-range attacks indicate an escalation in the conflict, targeting areas far beyond the active front lines. While the fighting on the main battlefront remains mostly stagnant, the civilian impact of these deep-strike operations has reached its highest level since the start of the war.
amharic: ሩሲያ እና ዩክሬን ባደረጉት የአየር እና የድሮን ጥቃት ቢያንስ ስምንት ሰዎች መሞታቸው ተገልጿል። እነዚህ ከጦር ግንባር ራቅ ባሉ አካባቢዎች የተፈጸሙ ጥቃቶች፣ የሁለቱ አገራት ግጭት ወደ አዲስ እና አደገኛ ምዕራፍ መሸጋገሩን ያሳያል። በጦር ግንባር ላይ ያለው ውጊያ በአብዛኛው የቆመ ቢሆንም፣ በሲቪል ነዋሪዎች ላይ እየደረሰ ያለው ጉዳት ግን ከጦርነቱ መጀመሪያ ጊዜ ወዲህ ከፍተኛ ደረጃ ላይ ደርሷል።
oromo: Raashiyaan fi Yuukreeniin weerara fageenya dheeraa irratti wal-kaasuun isaaniitiin lubbuun namoota saddeet ol darbeera. Weerarri kunneen daangaa irra darbee bakkeewwan waraana irraa fagaatanitti xiyyeeffachuun wal-worgorrummaa isaanii daran kan dabale ta'uu agarsiisa. Addabaaba'ii waraanaatti wal-worgorrummaan hamma tokko kan tasgabbaa'e fakkaatuus, miidhaan naga-buutota irra gahaa jiru garuu yeroo ammaa kana sadarkaa ol'aana irra gaheera.

title: Israel releases 35 detainees from Gaza
english: Israeli authorities have freed 35 Palestinian prisoners who were previously held in Gaza. The individuals were transported through the Karem Abu Salem border crossing. They have since arrived at Nasser Hospital in Khan Yunis to reconnect with their families.
amharic: የእስራኤል ባለስልጣናት በጋዛ ይዘዋቸው የነበሩ 35 ፍልስጤማውያን እስረኞችን ለቀዋል። እነዚህ ሰዎች በከረም አቡ ሳሌም መውጫ በኩል ተላልፈው ወደ ካን ዩኒስ በሚገኘው ናስር ሆስፒታል ደርሰዋል። እስረኞቹም ከቤተሰቦቻቸው ጋር እንደተቀላቀሉ ተገልጿል።
oromo: Mootummaan Israa'el namoota Palestina 35 ta'an kan Gazaarra qabamanii turan gadhiiseera. Namoonni kunneen daangaa Kareem Abuu Saalem irra darbuun gara Hospitaala Naasir kan Khan Yuunisitti geessamaniiru. Hundi isaaniis maatii isaanii wajjin wal arguuf danda'aniiru.

title: Why a North Sea oilfield is emerging as British PM Burnham’s big test
english: British Prime Minister Andy Burnham is facing significant pressure regarding the potential approval of the Rosebank oilfield project in the North Sea. While the project has garnered support from U.S. President Donald Trump, environmental activists and local residents strongly oppose it due to climate change concerns and risks to marine ecosystems. The government's decision on this development is being viewed as a critical test of its commitment to environmental protection and long-term climate goals.
amharic: የብሪታኒያው ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር አንዲ በርንሃም በሰሜን ባህር ውስጥ የሚገኘውን የሮዝባንክ የነዳጅ ማውጫ ፕሮጀክት ለማጽደቅ በሚወሰነው ውሳኔ ላይ ከፍተኛ ጫና እየደረሰባቸው ነው። ፕሮጀክቱ የአሜሪካው ፕሬዝዳንት ዶናልድ ትራምፕ ድጋፍ ቢኖረውም፣ የአካባቢ ጥበቃ ባለሙያዎች እና ነዋሪዎች በአየር ንብረት ለውጥ እና በባህር ውስጥ ስነ-ምህዳር ላይ ሊያደርስ የሚችለውን ጉዳት በመፍራት በጥብቅ ይቃወማሉ። መንግስት በዚህ ፕሮጀክት ላይ የሚሰጠው ውሳኔ ለአካባቢ ጥበቃ እና ለሀገሪቱ የአየር ንብረት ግቦች ያለውን ቁርጠኝነት የሚፈትሽ ወሳኝ ጉዳይ ሆኗል።
oromo: Mummichi Ministeeraa Biriteen Andii Barnhaam, iddoo boba'aa 'Rosebank' kan galaana Kaabaa keessatti argamu irratti hayyama kennuu ilaalchisee dhiibbaa guddaa keessa galanii jiru. Pirojeektiin kun deeggarsa Pirezidaantii Ameerikaa Doonaald Tiraamp kan qabu ta'us, ogeeyyonni naannoo fi jiraattonni naannichaa miidhaa jijjiirama qilleensaa fi miidhaa lubbu qabeeyyii galaana irratti geessisuu danda'u sodachuun mormaa jiru. Murtoon mootummaan pirojeektii kana irratti dabarsu, waadaa inni eegumsa naannoo fi galma qilleensaa irratti galeef qorumsa guddaa ta'ee jira.

title: Women’s Africa Cup of Nations 2026: What to know about the tournament
english: The 2026 Women’s Africa Cup of Nations is set to begin in Morocco, featuring 16 teams competing for the continental title and spots in the 2027 World Cup. Following a brief delay from its original spring start date, the tournament will run from late July until the final on August 16. Nigeria enters as the defending champion, facing strong competition from nations like Morocco, Zambia, and Ghana, who are fielding many of the tournament's top global stars.
amharic: የ2026 የሴቶች የአፍሪካ ዋንጫ በሞሮኮ አስተናጋጅነት ሊጀመር ነው። በውድድሩ 16 ሀገራት ለዋንጫው እና ለ2027 የዓለም ዋንጫ ማለፊያ ይፎካከራሉ። ውድድሩ ከመጀመሪያው መርሃ ግብር ዘግይቶ በሐምሌ ወር መጨረሻ ተጀምሮ እስከ ነሐሴ 16 ይቆያል። ናይጄሪያ የዋንጫው ባለቤት በመሆን ስትከላከል፣ ሞሮኮ፣ ዛምቢያ እና ጋና ዋንጫውን ለማንሳት ጠንካራ ተፎካካሪዎች ናቸው።
oromo: Walgahii kubbaa miilaa dubartoota Afrikaa bara 2026 biyya Morookootti kan jalqabamu yoo ta'u, gareewwan 16 sadarkaa kontinentii fi carraa seensaa marsaa xumuraa tapha guddicha adunyaa bara 2027f wal dorgomu. Taphoonni kunneen yeroo dura qabame irraa turee hanga Hagayya 16tti kan turuudha. Naayijeeriyaan qabduu mata duree taatee akka ittiftu eegama, akkasumas biyyoonni akka Morookoo, Zaambiyaa fi Gaanaa dorgomtoota cimaa ta'uun isaanii beekameera.

title: Khan faces historic removal vote as critics warn ICC process has been politicised
english: International Criminal Court member states are preparing for an unprecedented vote to decide whether to remove Chief Prosecutor Karim Khan over misconduct allegations. Critics and legal representatives argue the process is unfair, noting that Khan's team has been blocked from presenting a defense or addressing the assembly. The vote follows an investigation into accusations of non-consensual sexual conduct, which Khan denies, and claims of retaliation against staff members.
amharic: የዓለም አቀፉ የወንጀለኞች ፍርድ ቤት አባል አገራት ዋና አቃቤ ህግ ካሪም ካን በፈጸሙት ተብሎ በሚጠረጠር የስነ-ምግባር ጉድለት ከስልጣናቸው እንዲነሱ ለማድረግ በታሪክ ለመጀመሪያ ጊዜ ድምጽ ሊሰጡ ነው። የካሪም ካን የህግ ባለሙያዎች ክሱን ለመከላከል እና ለጉባኤው ማብራሪያ ለመስጠት እድል እንዳልተሰጣቸው በመግለጽ ሂደቱ ፍትሃዊ አይደለም ሲሉ ተችተዋል። ጉዳዩ ከስራ ባልደረባቸው ጋር በተያያዘ የቀረበውን የግዳጅ ወሲባዊ ጥቃት ክስ እና የበቀል እርምጃ ወስደዋል የሚሉ ክሶችን ያካትታል።
oromo: Miseensonni Mana Murtii yakka adunyaa (ICC) abbaa alangaa olaanaa Karim Khan himata hamii ykn amala badaa irratti dhiyaateen buusuuf taariikii keessatti yeroo jalqabaaf sagalee kennuuf qophaa’aa jiru. Gareen abukaattotaa Karim Khan akka of hin ittifanneefi yaada isaanii gubii murteessuuf hin dhiheessine dhorkamuu isaanii hordofee, adeemsichi seeraan alaa fi kan hin madoomne ta’uu himatu. Himatichi walitti dhufeenya saalqunnamtii hayyama malee raawwatame jedhuu fi hojjettoota irratti tarkaanfii haaloo bahuu fudhataniiru jedhu kan of keessatti qabatudha.

title: At least one killed in an Israeli drone strike in Gaza, hospital sources say
english: A drone strike carried out by the Israeli military in Gaza has resulted in the death of at least one individual. Several other people also sustained injuries during the attack. Medical personnel at al-Shifa hospital confirmed these casualties following the incident.
amharic: በጋዛ በእስራኤል የድሮን ጥቃት ቢያንስ አንድ ሰው መገደሉ ተሰምቷል። ጥቃቱ በርካታ ሰዎችንም አቁስሏል። በአል-ሺፋ ሆስፒታል የሚገኙ የህክምና ባለሙያዎች ይህንን መረጃ አረጋግጠዋል።
oromo: Gaza keessatti haleellaa xiyyaara koochittiin (drone) Israa'el raawwatte kanaan namni tokko yoo du'u, kanneen biroo hedduun immoo madaa'aniiru. Ogeeyyiin fayyaa hospitaala Al-Shifaa du'aafi miidhaa kana mirkaneessaniiru.

title: Israeli cities open shelters
english: Several Israeli cities have started opening public bomb shelters ahead of the weekend due to fears of potential military tensions with Iran. Local governments in areas like Ramat Gan, Eilat, and Beersheba took this measure as a precautionary step. This move follows reports indicating that authorities are bracing for a possible escalation in the region.
amharic: ከኢራን ጋር ሊከሰት ይችላል በተባለ ወታደራዊ ውጥረት ሳቢያ፣ በርካታ የእስራኤል ከተሞች የቦምብ መጠለያዎችን መክፈት ጀምረዋል። እንደ ረማት ጋን፣ ኢላት እና ቤርሼባ ያሉ የከተማ አስተዳደሮች ቅድመ ጥንቃቄዎችን ወስደዋል። ይህም ሊከሰት የሚችለውን ጥቃት ለመከላከል ባለሥልጣናቱ እያደረጉት ያለው ዝግጅት አካል ነው።
oromo: Iransa waliin walitti bu'iinsa uumamu danda'uuf sodaachuu irraa kan ka'e, magaalota Israa'el hedduun bakka namoonni itti dhokatan (shelters) banuu jalqabaniiru. Bulchiinsonni magaalota akka Ramat Gan, Eilat fi Beersheba tarkaanfii of eeggannoo kana fudhataniiru. Tarkaanfiin kun qophii mootummaan miidhaa uumamu danda'u ittisuuf godhamaa jiru dha.

title: 'A triumphant failure': How Israel's use of social media influencers to win back support backfired
english: Israel has spent hundreds of millions of dollars on social media campaigns and influencer partnerships to improve its public image in the West. Despite these efforts, public support for Israel continues to drop, particularly among younger people who rely on independent news sources. Experts suggest this strategy is backfiring because audiences often view these paid, coordinated posts as lacking authenticity.
amharic: እስራኤል በምዕራቡ ዓለም ያላትን ተቀባይነት ለማሻሻል በማህበራዊ ሚዲያ እና በተፅዕኖ ፈጣሪዎች ላይ ከፍተኛ የሆነ የገንዘብ ድጋፍ አድርጋለች። ሆኖም እነዚህ ጥረቶች ቢኖሩም፣ በተለይ በማህበራዊ ሚዲያ መረጃን በሚያገኙ ወጣቶች ዘንድ ለእስራኤል ያላቸው ድጋፍ እየቀነሰ መምጣቱን መረጃዎች ያመለክታሉ። ባለሙያዎች እንደሚናገሩት፣ ይፋዊ ወይም የሚከፈልባቸው የፕሮፓጋንዳ ዘመቻዎች የታለመላቸውን ውጤት ከማምጣት ይልቅ፣ የተመልካቾችን አመኔታ በማሳጣታቸው መልሰው ጉዳት እያደረሱ ነው።
oromo: Israa'el biyyoota dhihaa keessatti fudhatama qabaachuu ishee dabaluuf miidiyaa hawaasaa fi namoota dhiibbaa uumuu danda'anirratti qarshii hedduu baastee jirti. Ta'us, yaaliin kun bu'aa hin arganne; keessattuu dargaggoonni oduu miidiyaa hawaasaarraa hordofan Israa'el irratti qaban xiqqachaa dhufeera. Ogeeyyiin akka jedhanitti, tattaaffiin kun fashalaa kan jiru, gabaasawwan kaffaltiin godhaman kun dhugaa kan hin qabne fakkaatanii waan mul'ataniif, namoota biratti mufannaa fi shakkiin waan uumameefidha.

title: Iraq's prime minister arrives in Iran
english: Iraqi Prime Minister Ali al-Zaidi has traveled to Tehran for his first official visit to Iran. During the trip, he plans to meet with high-ranking Iranian leaders to address bilateral relations, regional stability, and mutual interests. This diplomatic visit follows his recent official trip to the United States last week.
amharic: የኢራቅ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር አሊ አል-ዛይዲ ለመጀመሪያ ጊዜ ኦፊሴላዊ የሥራ ጉብኝት ወደ ኢራን አቅንተዋል። በጉብኝታቸውም ከኢራን ከፍተኛ ባለሥልጣናት ጋር በመገናኘት በሁለቱ አገራት የጋራ ጥቅም፣ በሁለትዮሽ ግንኙነት እና በክልላዊ ሰላም እና መረጋጋት ዙሪያ ይወያያሉ ተብሎ ይጠበቃል። ይህ ዲፕሎማሲያዊ ጉዞ ባለፈው ሳምንት ወደ አሜሪካ ካደረጉት ጉብኝት በኋላ የተከናወነ ነው።
oromo: Mummichi ministeera Iraaq Alii Al-Zayidi gara Iraan imala seena qabeessa ta'e tokko taasiseera. Guyyaa har'aa Teheran ga'uun isaa kan himame yoo ta'u, hoogganoota biyyattii waliin hariiroo biyyoota lamaanii, nageenya naannichaa fi dhimmoota waloo irratti mari'achuuf karoorfateera. Imalli kun erga inni torban darbe gara Ameerikaa imalee booda kan itti aanu dha.

title: Ethiopia’s National Dialogue Could Unravel the Federal Bargain
english: Ethiopia has launched a National Dialogue aimed at addressing long-standing political tensions, but many in the Somali Region remain wary of the process. While the government presents this as a path to reconciliation, critics fear it may be used to centralize power and weaken constitutional protections for regional self-determination. Somali stakeholders emphasize that their grievances stem from poor implementation of the current federal system rather than the framework itself, and they are concerned that this initiative might undermine their rights.
amharic: ኢትዮጵያ ለረጅም ጊዜ የቆዩ የፖለቲካ አለመግባባቶችን ለመፍታት ብሄራዊ ምክክር የጀመረች ቢሆንም፣ በሶማሌ ክልል የሚገኙ ብዙዎች ሂደቱ አሳሳቢ እንደሆነ ይገልጻሉ። መንግስት ሂደቱን የብሄራዊ እርቅ መንገድ አድርጎ ቢያቀርበውም፣ ተቺዎች ስልጣንን ለማማከል እና የክልሎችን ራስን በራስ የማስተዳደር መብት ለማዳከም ጥቅም ላይ ይውላል ብለው ይፈራሉ። የሶማሌ ክልል ባለድርሻ አካላት ችግሩ ያለው አሁን ባለው የፌዴራል ስርዓት አተገባበር ላይ እንጂ በህገ መንግስቱ ላይ አለመሆኑን በማንሳት፣ ይህ ተነሳሽነት መብቶቻቸውን ሊሸረሽር ይችላል የሚል ስጋት አላቸው።
oromo: Itoophiyaan walitti bu'iinsa siyaasaa yeroo dheeraaf ture furuuf marii biyyaalessaa kan jalqabde yoo ta'u, garuu namoonni naannoo Somaalee keessa jiran hedduun adeemsa kana shakku. Mootummaan mariin kun araaraaf kan gargaaru ta'uu ibsuus, kanneen morman garuu adeemsichi aangoo giddugaleessatti harkisuufi mirga naannooleen ofiin of bulchuun qaban laaffisuuf kan yaadame ta'uu dubbatu. Qaamoleen naannoo Somaalee akka jedhanitti, rakkoon jiru hojiirra oolmaa sirna federaalaa kan har'aa malee bu'uura seeraa miti; kanaafuu, mariin kun mirga isaanii kan sarbu ta'uu danda'a jedhanii sodaatu.

title: Thousands evacuated in France fires
english: Wildfires in southwestern France have forced approximately 12,000 people, including many tourists, to flee their homes and campsites. Authorities have restricted access to forested areas and closed roads as emergency teams struggle to contain the flames that have already destroyed over 2,000 hectares of land. The region remains on high alert following the tragic deaths of two firefighters earlier in the week.
amharic: በደቡብ ምዕራብ ፈረንሳይ እየተስፋፋ ባለው የደን ቃጠሎ ምክንያት ወደ 12,000 የሚጠጉ ሰዎች ከቤታቸውና ከቱሪስት ማረፊያዎች ተፈናቅለዋል። ባለስልጣናት አካባቢውን ለመቆጣጠር ጥረት እያደረጉ ሲሆን በጫካ አካባቢዎች ላይ እንቅስቃሴን በመገደብ መንገዶችን ዘግተዋል። ቀደም ሲል ሁለት የእሳት አደጋ ተከላካዮች በህይወታቸው ማለፋቸውን ተከትሎ በአካባቢው ከፍተኛ የጥንቃቄ ሁኔታ ታውጇል።
oromo: Ibiddi bosonaa Faransaay kibba-dhihaatti bahaa jiru namoota kuma 12 ta'an manaa fi iddoo boqonnaa isaanirraa buqqiseera. Aangessitoonni iddoowwan bosonaa akka hin deemamne dhorkanii fi karaawwan cufuudhaan ibidda kana dhaamsuuf carraaqqii gochaa jiru. Torbee kana dura ibidda kanaan ogeeyyonni dhaamsaa ibiddaa lama lubbuun darbuun isaanii kan yaadatamu yoo ta'u, naannichis ammas sodaachisaa keessa jira.

title: Thai sailors sue owners of cargo ship hit in Hormuz
english: Thai crew members are taking legal action against their employer following a fatal strike on their cargo vessel in the Strait of Hormuz. The sailors allege that the ship's owners failed to take necessary precautions by ignoring security warnings provided by Iranian authorities. This lawsuit seeks to hold the company accountable for the dangerous conditions that led to the casualties.
amharic: በሆርሙዝ የባህር ሰላጤ በጭነት መርከባቸው ላይ በደረሰ ገዳይ ጥቃት የተጎዱ የታይላንድ መርከበኞች፣ አሰሪዎቻቸው ላይ ክስ መስርተዋል። መርከበኞቹ እንደሚሉት፣ የኢራን ባለስልጣናት የሰጡትን የደህንነት ማስጠንቀቂያ በመዘንጋታቸው ኩባንያው ለደረሰው አደጋ ተጠያቂ መሆን አለበት። ይህ ክስ ኩባንያው ለሰራተኞቹ ደህንነት በቂ ጥንቃቄ ባለማድረጉ የቀረበ ነው።
oromo: Hojjettoonni markabaa lammiilee Taayilaand ta'an, markabni isaanii harka qaxxaamura Hormuz keessatti erga haleelamee booda abbootii qabeenya markabichaa irratti himata bananiiru. Hojjettoonni kun akka jedhanitti, abbootii qabeenyichaa akeekkachiisa nageenyaa mootummaan Iraan kennee ture waan dagataniif balaan sun akka ga'u ta'eera. Himanni kun qaxxaamura hatattamaa ta'e kana keessatti lubbuun namootaa akka darbuuf sababa kan ta'e tuffii nageenyaa kana irratti xiyyeeffata.

title: Iran, Houthis strike tankers as US bombing continues: What’s the latest?
english: The United States has conducted its twelfth consecutive night of military strikes against Iranian infrastructure, targeting missile facilities, air defenses, and maritime sites. In retaliation, Iran and Houthi forces have launched attacks on oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz and the Red Sea. The conflict has resulted in several civilian casualties and damaged key infrastructure, including power substations and naval vessels, significantly disrupting maritime trade routes.
amharic: አሜሪካ በተከታታይ ለአስራ ሁለት ምሽቶች በአይራን ወታደራዊ ተቋማት እና የመከላከያ አቅሞች ላይ የአየር ጥቃት ማድረሷን ቀጥላለች። ለዚህ ምላሽ ኢራን እና የሁቲ ታጣቂዎች በሆርሙዝ የባህር ወሽመጥ እና በቀይ ባህር ውስጥ በነዳጅ መርከቦች ላይ ጥቃት ፈጽመዋል። ግጭቱ የሲቪል ሰዎችን ህይወት ከመቅጠፉም በላይ የሃይል ማመንጫዎችን እና የባህር መርከቦችን በመጉዳት በአለም አቀፍ የንግድ መስመሮች ላይ ከፍተኛ መስተጓጎል አስከትሏል።
oromo: Amerika halkanii guyyaa kudha lamaaf walitti aansuun bu'uuraalee waraanaa fi meeshaalee ittisaa Iran irratti haleellaa qilleensa irraa gaggeessaa jirti. Iran fi gareen Houtiis deebii kanaan, dooniiwwan boba'aa baatan irratti garba Diimaa fi iddoo Hormuz jedhamutti haleellaa raawwataniiru. Walitti bu'iinsa kanaan lubbuun namootaa darbuu fi miidhaan bu'uuraalee misoomaa fi dooniiwwan irratti gahuun, daandiiwwan daldala galaanaa addunyaa irratti rakkoo cimaa uumeera.

title: ‘Televising our revolution’: India’s Gen Z flips Modi’s social media game
english: Young protesters in India are using social media to challenge Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s government by sharing raw footage of police crackdowns during recent student demonstrations. These young activists are effectively turning the digital tools previously used by the ruling party against them to document state violence and rally public support. By creating viral content about ongoing examination paper leaks, Gen Z is successfully shaping the national narrative and promoting anti-government dissent.
amharic: የህንድ ወጣቶች በቅርቡ በተካሄደው የተማሪዎች ተቃውሞ ወቅት የፖሊስ ጥቃትን የሚያሳዩ ምስሎችን በማህበራዊ ሚዲያ በማሰራጨት የመንግስትን ስልጣን እየተፈታተኑ ይገኛሉ። እነዚህ ወጣቶች ገዥው ፓርቲ ቀደም ሲል ለራሱ ጥቅም ይጠቀምባቸው የነበሩ የዲጂታል መድረኮችን አሁን በመጠቀም የመንግስትን ግፍ ለህዝብ እያጋለጡ ነው። በተፈጠረው የፈተና ወረቀት ዝርፊያ ዙሪያ በማህበራዊ ሚዲያ በሚለቀቁ ይዘቶች አማካይነት፣ አዲሱ ትውልድ የመንግስትን የበላይነት በመሞገት ተቃውሞን እያቀጣጠለ ነው።
oromo: dargaggoonni Hindii gaffii qormaataa hatamee bahe irratti mormii godhaniin walqabatee, gocha raayyaa ittisa biyyattii irratti raawwatamu viidiyoodhaan waraabanii miidiyaa hawaasaa irratti maxxansuun mootummaa pirezdaant Narendra Modii qeeqaa jiru. Dargaggoonni kunneen meeshaalee dijitaalaa kanaan dura paartiin biyya bulchu of jabeessuuf itti fayyadamaa ture, amma gara isaatti garagalchuun miidhaa mootummaan raawwatu saaxilaa jiru. Akkaataa kanaan, dhalootni haaraa kun odeeffannoo miidiyaa hawaasaa fayyadamuun mormii mootummaa irratti qaban babal'isuun xiyyeeffannoo uummata biyyattii ofitti harkisaa jiru.

title: More than 2,300 Israelis storm Al-Aqsa Mosque in Jerusalem
english: Over 2,300 Israeli settlers and far-right activists, accompanied by National Security Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir, entered the Al-Aqsa Mosque compound during a Jewish holiday. Palestinian authorities reported that Israeli security forces restricted Muslim access to the site while allowing settlers to perform unauthorized prayers and rituals. This event marks one of the largest incursions into the holy site this year, further increasing tensions in East Jerusalem.
amharic: ከ2,300 የሚበልጡ እስራኤላዊያን ሰፋሪዎች እና የጽንፈኛ ቡድን አባላት በብሔራዊ ደህንነት ሚኒስትሩ ኢታማር ቤን-ግቪር ታጅበው በአይሁድ በዓል ምክንያት ወደ አል-አቅሳ መስጊድ ግቢ ገብተዋል። የፍልስጤም ባለስልጣናት እንደገለጹት፣ የእስራኤል የጸጥታ ሃይሎች ሙስሊም ምዕመናን ወደ መስጊዱ እንዳይገቡ በመከልከል ሰፋሪዎች ያልተፈቀደ ጸሎት እንዲያደርጉ ፈቅደዋል። ይህ በዓመት ውስጥ ከተደረጉ ትላልቅ የመግባት ሙከራዎች አንዱ ሲሆን በምስራቅ እየሩሳሌም ያለውን ውጥረት አባብሶታል።
oromo: Namoonni Israa'el 2,300 ol ta'an fi gareewwan mirga-fayyidduummaa cimaa qaban, ministira nageenya biyyaa Itamaar Ben-Gviir waliin ta'uun, ayyaana amantii Yihuudotaa sababeeffachuun masjiida Al-Aqsa seenan. Aangessonni Falasxiin akka ibsanitti, waraanni Israa'el namoonni Muslimoota ta'an bakka sanatti akka hin galle dhorkuun, namoonni biroo immoo seeraan ala kadhannaa akka raawwatan hayyamaniiru. Gochi kun kutaalee masjiidichatti seenuun bara kana keessa iddoo guddaa kan qabu yoo ta'u, kunis magaalaa Yerusaalem bahaa keessatti walitti bu'iinsa uumame caalaatti hammaachiseera.

title: ‘Back from the dead’: The continuing agony over Gaza’s 9,500 missing people
english: The unexpected survival and return of Hamada al-Banna, who was presumed dead by his family, has brought attention to the ongoing crisis of thousands of missing people in Gaza. With estimates suggesting up to 9,500 individuals remain unaccounted for due to the conflict, many families continue to live in uncertainty and grief. Al-Banna’s harrowing experience includes being critically wounded, held in a coma, and subjected to prolonged detention and abuse by Israeli forces.
amharic: ቤተሰቦቹ እንደሞተ አድርገው አስበውት የነበረው ሀማዳ አል-ባና በህይወት መትረፉና ወደ ቤቱ መመለሱ በጋዛ ስላሉት በሺዎች የሚቆጠሩ የጠፉ ሰዎች ያለውን አሳዛኝ ሁኔታ ትኩረት እንዲሰጠው አድርጓል። በጦርነቱ ምክንያት እስካሁን ድረስ ወደ 9,500 የሚጠጉ ሰዎች የት እንዳሉ የማይታወቅ ሲሆን ይህም በብዙ ቤተሰቦች ላይ ከፍተኛ ስቃይና እርግጠኛ አለመሆንን ፈጥሯል። አል-ባና በህክምና ወቅት የደረሰበት ከባድ ጉዳት፣ የኮማ ሁኔታ እና በእስራኤል እስር ቤት ውስጥ የገጠመው አሰቃቂ አያያዝ የጋዛ ህዝብ የሚገኝበትን አስከፊ ሁኔታ ያሳያል።
oromo: Maatiin isaa akka du'etti yaadamee ture Haamaadaa Al-Bannaa lubbuun deebi'uun isaa, namoota Gaaza keessatti qoccolloo waraanaan badee jiraatan kumaatama hedduu yaadachiiseera. Hanga namoota 9,500 ta'an ganda tokko tokko keessatti dhabamuun isaanii maatiiwwan hedduu rifaatuufi shakkiin akka jiraatan godheera. Muuxannoon Al-Bannaa miidhaa qaamaa hamaa, koman keessa turuu fi yeroo dheeraaf hidhaa fi dararaa waraana Israa'el jalatti dabarse kan of keessatti qabate yommuu ta'u, kunis rakkoo guddaa namoota achi keessa jiraniif jiru agarsiisa.

title: Israeli army shoots two Palestinians in occupied West Bank
english: Israeli forces shot two Palestinians in the West Bank town of Beit Furik following a stabbing attack that left an Israeli settler critically injured. In response to the violence, the military has established checkpoints surrounding the area. Local medical teams are currently providing care to the two wounded Palestinian men.
amharic: በምዕራብ ባንክ በምትገኘው በቤት ፉሪክ ከተማ እስራኤላዊ ሰፋሪ በቢላ ከተወጋ በኋላ የእስራኤል ወታደሮች ሁለት ፍልስጤማውያንን በጥይት መትተዋል። የፍልስጤም ቀይ ጨረቃ እንደገለጸው ጉዳት የደረሰባቸው ሰዎች ህክምና እየተደረገላቸው ሲሆን እስራኤልም በከተማዋ አካባቢ የፍተሻ ጣቢያዎችን አቋቁማለች። ይህ ጥቃት የተፈጠረው ሰፋሪው ከባድ ጉዳት ከደረሰበት በኋላ ነው።
oromo: Magala Beet Furiik kan Qarqara Lixaa keessatti namni Israa'el tokko waraantee miidhaa hamaa irra ga'e hordofee, waraanni Israa'el namoota Palastinaa lama rasaasaan rukutanii miidhan. Gargaarsi Ariifataa Palastinaa akka ibsetti, namoonni miidhaman kun gargaarsa yaalaaf dhiyaachaa jiru. Kanaan walqabatee, waraanni Israa'el magaalaa sana marsuun qajeelfama to'annoo cimaa diriirsee jira.

title: UK mosques attacked once every five days in last year, amid rising Islamophobia
english: New data indicates that mosques across the UK have been targeted by various forms of hate crimes and violence every five days over the past year. Muslim leaders are criticizing the government for slow responses and bureaucratic obstacles that hinder access to security funding, leaving many communities feeling unprotected. While the government has pledged financial support for safety measures, there is significant concern that rising Islamophobia and inadequate law enforcement support are putting these religious sites at continued risk.
amharic: አዲስ መረጃ እንደሚያሳየው ባለፈው አንድ ዓመት ውስጥ በእንግሊዝ በሚገኙ መስጊዶች ላይ በየአምስት ቀኑ የጥቃት ወይም የጥላቻ ወንጀል ይፈጸም ነበር። ሙስሊም መሪዎች መንግስት ለችግሩ በቂ ምላሽ ባለመስጠቱ እና የደህንነት ድጋፍ ለማግኘት አስቸጋሪ የሆነ ቢሮክራሲ በመኖሩ ማህበረሰቡ ለከፍተኛ ስጋት እንደተጋለጠ ይከሳሉ። መንግስት ለደህንነት መጠበቂያ በጀት ቢመድብም፣ እየጨመረ የመጣው እስላሞፎቢያ እና የህግ አስከባሪዎች የዘገየ ምላሽ መስጊዶችን አሁንም ለአደጋ እያጋለጠ መሆኑን ስጋት ፈጥሯል።
oromo: Odeeffannoon haaraan akka agarsiisutti, waggaa darbe keessa biyya Ingilizitti masjiidonni guyyaa shan shan keessatti al tokko miidhaa fi jibba adda addaaf saaxilamaa turaniiru. Hogganoonni Muslimootaa mootummaan rakkoo kanaaf furmaata hatattamaa akka hin kennine fi gargaarsa nageenyaa argachuuf adeemsi biirokrasii ulfaataa ta'uu isaan masjiidonnii fi hawaasni kun miidhaaf saaxilamuu isaanii himatu. Mootummaan eegumsaaf maallaqa waadaa galee kan jiru ta'us, jibbi Islaamummaa dabalaa adeemuun fi humnoonni nageenyaa deeggarsa gahaa kennuu dhabuun isaanii bakkeewwan amantii kana balaa keessa buusee jira.

title: Oman working with Saudi 'brothers' and Yemeni 'parties' for de-escalation
english: Oman is actively engaging with Saudi Arabia, various Yemeni groups, and the United Nations to promote peace in the Red Sea region. The country is encouraging all involved parties to remain calm and avoid further military tension. Their primary goal is to restart political dialogue to ensure long-term regional stability.
amharic: ኦማን በቀይ ባህር አካባቢ ሰላምን ለማስፈን ከሳውዲ አረቢያ፣ ከየመን ወገኖች እና ከተባበሩት መንግስታት ድርጅት ጋር በቅርበት እየሰራች ነው። አገሪቱ ግጭትን ለማስወገድ እና ሁሉም አካላት መረጋጋትን እንዲመርጡ ጥሪ እያቀረበች ነው። ዋናው ዓላማውም በክልሉ ዘላቂ ሰላም እንዲኖር የፖለቲካ ንግግሮችን እንደገና ማስጀመር ነው።
oromo: Oman naannoo galaana diimaa keessatti nagaa buusuuf biyya Saudi Arabia, gareewwan Yaman garagaraa fi dhaabbata mootummoota gamtoomaniin waliin hojjachaa jirti. Biyyattiin gamtaan hundi waraana fi walitti bu'iinsa irraa akka of qusatan gorsaa jirti. Kaayyoon ishee inni guddaan marii siyaasaa deebisanii jalqabsiisuudhaan naannichatti tasgabbii fi nagaa waggaa dheeraaf turu fiduudha.

title: UN secretary-general race: What it takes to be the world’s top diplomat
english: The United Nations is preparing to select a new secretary-general to succeed Antonio Guterres, who completes his second term at the end of 2026. Although the role is officially an administrative one, the secretary-general serves as a crucial global mediator and diplomat capable of influencing international conflicts. The selection process involves intense lobbying and requires the approval of the UN Security Council, particularly the five permanent members with veto power.
amharic: የተባበሩት መንግስታት ድርጅት ሁለተኛ የስልጣን ዘመናቸውን በ2026 መጨረሻ የሚያጠናቅቁትን አንቶኒዮ ጉቴሬዝን የሚተካ አዲስ ዋና ጸሃፊ በመምረጥ ላይ ይገኛል። የዚህ የስራ መደብ በዋናነት አስተዳደራዊ ቢሆንም፣ ዋና ጸሃፊው ዓለም አቀፍ ግጭቶችን በመደራደር እና በዲፕሎማሲያዊ መንገድ በመፍታት ረገድ ትልቅ ሚና ይጫወታሉ። የአዲሱ አመራር ምርጫ ሂደት ከባድ የሎቢ ስራዎችን የሚጠይቅ ሲሆን፣ የተባበሩት መንግስታት የጸጥታው ምክር ቤት አባላት እና በተለይም ቪቶ የመጠቀም ስልጣን ያላቸው አምስቱ ቋሚ አባላት ውሳኔ ወሳኝ ነው።
oromo: Tokkummaan Mootummootaa (UN) bakka bu'aa Antooniyoo Guuteereez kan ta'an fi bara 2026 xumura irratti hojii isaanii gadhiisan, barreessaa olaanaa haaraa filachuuf qophiirra jira. Hojichi haala seeraa fi bulchiinsa irratti xiyyeeffatuus, barreessaan olaanaa kun rakkoolee biyyoota addunyaa gidduutti uumaman gidduu seenuun marii fi diippilomaasiin akka furaman gochuuf gahee guddaa qaba. Filannoon kun dhiibbaa fi mariiwwan gurguddoo kan gaafatu yoo ta'u, Koreen Nageenyaa UN fi keessattuu biyyoonni shan iddoo dhaabbataa fi mirga 'veto' qaban murtoo isaanii irratti gahee murteessaa qabu.

title: Sirens sound off across Bahrain
english: Emergency sirens have been activated across Bahrain, prompting the Ministry of Interior to issue an official alert. Authorities are advising all residents and citizens to stay composed and relocate to the safest available areas immediately. This warning comes as the nation monitors the possibility of incoming strikes from Iran.
amharic: በባህሬን በሙሉ የአደጋ ጊዜ ማስጠንቀቂያ ደወሎች በመሰማታቸው የሀገሪቱ የውስጥ ጉዳይ ሚኒስቴር ይፋዊ መግለጫ አውጥቷል። ባለስልጣናቱ ነዋሪዎች እና ዜጎች መረጋጋትን ጠብቀው ወደ ደህንነቱ የተጠበቀ ቦታ እንዲሄዱ አሳስበዋል። ይህ ማስጠንቀቂያ የተሰጠው ከአይራን ሊሰነዘሩ የሚችሉ ጥቃቶችን በመስጋት ነው።
oromo: Bahreyn keessatti bilbilli ykn sagaleen akeekkachiisaa dhaga'amuun hordofee, Ministeerri Dhimma Keessa biyyattii ibsa baaseera. Abbootiin taayitaa lammiileen fi jiraattoonni hundi tasgabbii qabaatanii gara bakka nageenya qabuutti akka seenan gorsaniiru. Akeekkachiisni kun kan kenname weerara Iran irraa dhufuu danda'uuf soda jiruun walqabatee dha.

title: 'I am still alive': Indian activist on hunger strike for 26 days loses 11kg
english: Indian activist Sonam Wangchuk has spent 26 days on a hunger strike demanding education reform and the resignation of the Education Minister, resulting in a significant 11kg weight loss. Although he was moved to a hospital after being forcibly removed from the protest site, his movement continues to attract thousands of supporters in Delhi. While Prime Minister Narendra Modi recently promised stricter punishments for exam fraud, protesters remain unsatisfied and are calling for deeper systemic changes to prevent the issues from occurring in the first place.
amharic: የህንድ የትምህርት አክቲቪስት ሶናም ዋንግቹክ የትምህርት ማሻሻያዎችን እና የትምህርት ሚኒስትሩን መልቀቅ በመጠየቅ ለ26 ቀናት የረሃብ አድማ ላይ በመሆናቸው 11 ኪሎ ግራም ክብደት ቀንሰዋል። ከአድማው ቦታ በኃይል ከተነሱ በኋላ በሆስፒታል ህክምና እየተደረገላቸው ቢሆንም፣ የጀመሩት የተቃውሞ እንቅስቃሴ በዴሊ በሺዎች የሚቆጠሩ ሰዎችን በማስተባበር ቀጥሏል። ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ናሬንድራ ሞዲ ለፈተና ማጭበርበር ጠንካራ ቅጣት እንደሚኖር ቃል ቢገቡም፣ ተቃዋሚዎች ግን ችግሩ ከስሩ እንዲፈታ በመጠየቅ ትግላቸውን እንደቀጠሉበት ነው።
oromo: Hirmaattuun mirga barnootaa Hindii Sonam Wangchuk, jijjiirama barnootaa fi gaaffii gad-lakkisa ministira barnootaa dhageessisuuf guyyoota 26f hiriira beelaa gaggeessaa jiruun ulfaatina qaamaa isaanii kilogiraama 11 dhabaniiru. Erga bakka hiriirichaa irraa humnaan kaafamanii hospitaala galfamanii booda, sochii isaan jalqaban hiriirtota kumaatamaan lakkaa'aman waliin ammas itti fufee jira. Ministirri Muummee Narendra Moodi waa'ee rakkoo qormaataa ilaalchisee tarkaanfii cimaa fudhachuu waadaa seenanillee, hiriirtotni rakkoon kun hundee isaarraa akka furamu gaafachuun mormii isaanii itti fufaniiru.

title: Canada's 'powerful' dairy sector is in Trump's trade crosshairs
english: Donald Trump has threatened to impose a 50% tariff on Canadian goods, specifically targeting Canada's dairy supply management system. The U.S. government views these production quotas and import restrictions as unfair to American farmers seeking access to the Canadian market. However, Canadian officials and the influential domestic dairy industry are refusing to negotiate, arguing that the system is essential for maintaining stable food prices and supporting rural communities.
amharic: ዶናልድ ትራምፕ በካናዳ የወተት ምርት አቅርቦት አስተዳደር ሥርዓት ላይ ያነጣጠረ የ50 በመቶ የታሪፍ ጭማሪ እንደሚጥሉ አስፈራርተዋል። የአሜሪካ መንግሥት ይህንን የኮታ እና የዋጋ አወጣጥ ሥርዓት የአሜሪካ አርሶ አደሮች ወደ ካናዳ ገበያ እንዳይገቡ የሚከለክል ኢ-ፍትሃዊ አካሄድ አድርጎ ይመለከተዋል። የካናዳ ባለስልጣናት እና ተፅእኖ ፈጣሪው የወተት ዘርፍ ማህበረሰብ ግን ይህ ሥርዓት የምግብ ዋጋን ለማረጋጋት እና የገጠር ማህበረሰቦችን ለመደገፍ ወሳኝ በመሆኑ ድርድር እንደማይደረግበት ገልጸዋል።
oromo: Donald Trump gabaa Kanadaan aannanii fi oomishaalee aannanii irratti hordoftu irratti qaraxii dhibbeentaa 50 ta'u akka buusu akeekkachiiseera. Mootummaan Ameerikaa sirna oomisha murteessuu fi gatii ramaduu kun qonnaan bultoota Ameerikaa gabaa Kaanaadaa irratti miidhuu isaa dubbata. Haa ta'u malee, hoggantoonni Kaanaadaa fi dhaabbileen aannanii biyyattii sirni kun gatii nyaataa tasgabbeessuu fi qonnaan bultoota baadiyyaa gargaaruuf barbaachisaa waan ta'eef, irratti walii galuun akka hin danda'amne ibsaniiru.

title: Travellers panic as US attacks Iran-Iraq border crossing
english: A recent United States military strike targeted the Shalamcheh border crossing situated between Iran and Iraq. The attack caused widespread alarm among travelers in the area. According to reports from the Iranian Mehr Agency, the incident resulted in two fatalities and left eleven other individuals wounded.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ጥቃት በኢራን እና በኢራቅ መካከል በሚገኘው የሻላምቼ የድንበር ማቋረጫ ላይ ተፈጽሟል። ይህ ድንገተኛ ጥቃት በቦታው ላይ የነበሩ ተጓዦችን ከፍተኛ ፍርሃት ውስጥ ጥሏቸዋል። የኢራን መህር የዜና ወኪል እንደዘገበው ከሆነ፣ ጥቃቱ የሁለት ሰዎችን ሕይወት የቀጠፈ ሲሆን ሌሎች አስራ አንድ ሰዎች ላይ ደግሞ ጉዳት አድርሷል።
oromo: Humni waraanaa Ameerikaa daangaa biyyoota Iraan fi Iraaq gidduutti argamu Shalamcheh jedhamurratti haleellaa raawwateera. Haleellaan kun namoota achitti imalaa turan gidduutti rifaatumaa guddaa uumee jira. Gabaasni ejansii oduu Iraan Mehr akka ibsetti, haleellaa kanaan lubbuun namoota lamaa darbee, namoonni kudha tokko immoo miidhaniiru.

title: India’s Modi promises fast-track courts for exam fraud fuelling protests
english: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi has announced plans to establish fast-track courts to provide quick legal consequences for individuals involved in exam paper leaks. This promise follows widespread youth-led protests, organized by the Cockroach Janta Party, which demand education reforms and the resignation of the Education Minister. However, protest leaders have criticized the proposal, arguing that it fails to address the deep systemic issues causing these exam irregularities.
amharic: የህንድ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ናሬንድራ ሞዲ፣ የፈተና ወረቀት ሌብነትን የሚፈጽሙ ሰዎችን በፍጥነት ለፍርድ የሚያቀርቡ ልዩ ፍርድ ቤቶችን እንደሚያቋቁሙ ቃል ገብተዋል። ይህ እርምጃ የተወሰደው በኮክሮች ጃንታ ፓርቲ የሚመራው እና የትምህርት ሚኒስትሩን ስልጣን መልቀቅ የሚጠይቀው የተማሪዎች ተቃውሞ እየተባባሰ በመምጣቱ ነው። ይሁን እንጂ የተቃውሞው አስተባባሪዎች ይህ መፍትሄ የትምህርት ስርዓቱን መሰረታዊ ችግሮች የሚፈታ አይደለም በማለት ነቅፈውታል።
oromo: Mummichi Ministeera Indiyaa Narendra Moodiin, namoota qormaata biyyoolessaa hatan hatattamaan adabsiisuuf mana murtii addaa akka hundeessan waadaa galaniiru. Tarkaanfiin kun kan dhufe, garee 'Cockroach Janta Party' jedhamuun qopha'ee fi Ministeerri Barnootaa aangoo gadhiisuu akka qaban gaafatu erga jabaatee booda. Ta'us, qindeessitoonni mormichaa yaanni kun rakkoo sirna barnootaa keessa jiru furuuf ga'aa miti jechuun mormaniiru.

title: Top US and Russian diplomats discuss Ukraine war in Manila
english: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio and Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov held a brief meeting in Manila to discuss the ongoing war in Ukraine. While Lavrov signaled Russia's openness to a diplomatic resolution based on previous high-level proposals, he also strongly criticized Western arms supplies to Kyiv. The US side acknowledged the difficulty the conflict poses for bilateral relations but expressed a continued desire to find ways to bring the fighting to an end.
amharic: የአሜሪካ የውጭ ጉዳይ ሚኒስትር ማርኮ ሩቢዮ እና የሩሲያው አቻቸው ሰርጌ ላቭሮቭ በዩክሬን ጦርነት ዙሪያ ለመነጋገር በፊሊፒንስ መዲና ማኒላ ተገናኝተዋል። በውይይቱ ላቭሮቭ ቀደም ሲል በነበሩ የመሪዎች ስምምነቶች መሰረት ለፖለቲካዊ መፍትሄ ዝግጁ መሆናቸውን የገለጹ ሲሆን፣ የምዕራባውያን ለዩክሬን የሚያደርጉትን የጦር መሳሪያ ድጋፍ ግን ተቃውመዋል። አሜሪካ በበኩሏ የዩክሬን ጦርነት በሁለቱ አገራት ግንኙነት ላይ ከፍተኛ ተጽዕኖ እያሳደረ መሆኑን በመጥቀስ፣ ጦርነቱን ለማቆም የሚደረገውን ጥረት እንደምትደግፍ አስታውቃለች።
oromo: Ministirri Dhimmi Alaa Ameerikaa Maarkoo Ruubiyoo fi Ministirri Dhimmi Alaa Raashiyaa Sergey Laavroov dhimma waraana Yuukireen irratti mari'achuuf magaalaa Maaniilaa keessatti wal arganiiru. Laavroov waraana kana xumuruuf marii dippiloomaasiif fedhii qabaachuu isaanii ibsanus, biyyoonni Dhihaa Yuukireeniif meeshaa waraanaa dhiyeessuu akka dhaaban gaafataniiru. Gama Ameerikaatiin, waraanni kun hariiroo biyyoota lamaan gidduu jiru irratti dhiibbaa cimaa geessisaa akka jiru ibsuun, waraana kana dhaabuuf carraaqqii taasifamu kan deggaran ta'uu beeksisaniiru.

title: Arsenal defender Saliba sidelined for ‘extended period’ due to back injury
english: Arsenal defender William Saliba will be out of action for a significant time due to a back injury sustained during the 2026 World Cup. Although he does not require surgery, he will undergo a structured rehabilitation program to recover his fitness. The club is currently focused on his recovery as they prepare to defend their Premier League title without him for the start of the season.
amharic: የአርሰናል ተከላካይ የሆነው ዊሊያም ሳሊባ በ2026 የዓለም ዋንጫ ወቅት በደረሰበት የጀርባ ጉዳት ምክንያት ለረጅም ጊዜ ከሜዳ እንደሚርቅ ታውቋል። ምንም እንኳን የቀዶ ጥገና ሕክምና የማያስፈልገው ቢሆንም፣ ሙሉ በሙሉ ለማገገም የረጅም ጊዜ የሕክምና ክትትልና የመልሶ ማቋቋም ፕሮግራም ይጀምራል። አርሰናል የፕሪሚየር ሊግ ዋንጫውን ለመከላከል በሚዘጋጅበት በዚህ ወቅት፣ ተጫዋቹ በአስቸኳይ ወደ ብቃቱ እንዲመለስ ክለቡ አስፈላጊውን ድጋፍ እያደረገለት ይገኛል።
oromo: Ispoortii kubbaa miilaa irratti, ittisaan garee Arsenal William Saliba madaa dugdaa bara 2026 waancaa addunyaarratti isa mudateen kan ka'e yeroo dheeraaf dirree irraa akka fagaatu beekameera. Akkaataa madaa isaa irratti hundaa'uun yeroof baqaqsanii hodhuun kan isa hin barbaachisne ta'us, fayyummaa isaa guutuuf jecha sagantaa deebisanii dhaabuu (rehabilitation) keessa darba. Gareen Arsenal dorgommii liigii Ingilizii eegaluuf qophaa'aa jiru keessatti, Saliba ariitiin akka deebi'uuf gargaarsa barbaachisaa ta'e godhaafii jira.

title: Between hope and fear: Yemenis react to Houthi blockade on Saudi Arabia
english: The Houthis have initiated a naval blockade against Saudi Arabia, triggering widespread anxiety among Yemenis that a prolonged period of relative calm may be nearing its end. Citizens fear that this escalation will lead to renewed conflict, severe fuel shortages, and a worsening humanitarian crisis that will make daily survival nearly impossible. While Houthi supporters view the move as a challenge to Saudi influence, many ordinary people worry they will ultimately bear the brunt of the instability and economic hardship.
amharic: ሁቲዎች በሳውዲ አረቢያ ላይ የባህር ላይ እገዳ መጣላቸው በየመን ህዝቦች ዘንድ ከፍተኛ ስጋት የፈጠረ ሲሆን፣ ለተወሰኑ ዓመታት የቆየው አንጻራዊ ሰላም ሊያበቃ ይችላል የሚል ስጋት እንዲፈጠር አድርጓል። ይህ የሁቲዎች እርምጃ እንደገና ጦርነትን በመቀስቀስ የነዳጅ እጥረት እና የሰብአዊ ቀውስን ያባብሳል ብለው ነዋሪዎች ይፈራሉ። የሁቲ ደጋፊዎች ይህንን እርምጃ እንደ ድል ቢቆጥሩትም፣ ተራው የየመን ህዝብ ግን በኢኮኖሚ ቀውስ እና በኑሮ ውድነት መከራን እንደሚያስተናግድ ይናገራሉ።
oromo: Houthiwwan Sa'udii Arabiyaa irratti harka galchaa galaana irraa erga godhanii booda, Yemen keessatti sodaafi yaaddoon babal'atee jira. Sababa kanaan, waggoota muraasaaf ture nagaanifi tasgabbiin akka xumuramuufi waraanni haaraan akka ka'u namoonni hedduun sodaachaa jiru. Tarkaanfiin kun hanqina boba'aafi rakkoo namoomaa kan babal'isu ta'uusaatiin, jireenyi guyyuu uummataarratti dhiibbaa cimaa geessisa jedhamee sodaatama. Deeggartoonni Houthii tarkaanfichaan yoo gammadanis, namoonni baay'een garuu qabsoo kanaan miidhamuu isaanitti yaadda'u.

title: Jordanian army intercepts Iranian missiles
english: The Jordanian military reported that it successfully blocked three missiles launched from Iran earlier today. Additionally, a fourth missile landed in an empty region of the country, resulting in no reported casualties. This incident highlights the regional tensions surrounding recent aerial activities.
amharic: የዮርዳኖስ ጦር ዛሬ ማለዳ ከኢራን የተተኮሱ ሶስት ሚሳኤሎችን መትቶ መጣሉን አስታውቋል። ሌላ አንድ ሚሳኤል በሰው አልባ አካባቢ መውደቁም ተገልጿል። በዚህ ድርጊት የደረሰ ጉዳት እንደሌለ ተመልክቷል።
oromo: Raayyaan ittisa biyya Yordaanos ganama har'a misaa'eloota Iran irraa dhukaafaman sadii akka rukutee kuffise beeksiseera. Misaa'elli afraffaan tokko ammoo lafa namni hin jiraanne keessatti kufuu isaa gabaasaniiru. Kanaan walqabatee miidhaan nama irra ga'e akka hin jirre ibsameera.

title: Explosions heard in Iran's Konarak
english: Several loud explosions have been reported in the city of Konarak, located within Iran's Sistan and Baluchestan province. The news was shared by the Iranian Tasnim news agency. Official details regarding the cause or potential damage from these blasts have not yet been released.
amharic: በኢራን ሲስታን እና ባሉቼስታን ግዛት ውስጥ በሚገኘው ኮናራክ ከተማ በርካታ የፍንዳታ ድምፆች ተሰምተዋል። ይህንኑ የኢራኑ ታስኒም የዜና ወኪል ዘግቧል። ስለ ፍንዳታዎቹ መንስኤ ወይም ስለደረሰው ጉዳት እስካሁን በይፋ የታወቀ ነገር የለም።
oromo: Magaalaa Konarak kan naannoo Sistan fi Baluchestan keessa jirtutti sagaleen dhohiinsa gurguddaa dhagahameera. Gabaasni kun kan dhiyaate ejansii oduu Iraan Tasnimiti. Sababa dhohiinsichaa ykn miidhaa gahuu danda'e irratti hanga ammaatti odeeffannoon ifa ta'e hin jiru.

title: How Israel used Venezuela earthquake response for propaganda in Caracas
english: Following a devastating earthquake in Venezuela that killed over 5,000 people, Israel sent a rescue team to assist with recovery efforts despite having no official diplomatic relations since 2009. Critics suggest that Israel used this humanitarian mission as a public relations strategy to improve its international image amid intense global criticism regarding the war in Gaza. While Venezuela's government officially welcomed and thanked the Israeli delegation for their work, observers view these actions as a symbolic move to break Israel's diplomatic isolation rather than a genuine shift in policy.
amharic: ቬንዙዌላ ውስጥ ከ5,000 በላይ ሰዎችን የገደለ አውዳሚ የመሬት መንቀጥቀጥ ከተከሰተ በኋላ፣ እስራኤል ከ2009 ወዲህ ዲፕሎማሲያዊ ግንኙነት ባይኖራትም የእርዳታ ቡድን ልካለች። ተቺዎች እንደሚሉት፣ እስራኤል ይህንን የሰብአዊ እርዳታ ተልዕኮ በጋዛ ጦርነት ምክንያት የተጋረጠባትን ዓለም አቀፍ ትችት ለመቀነስ እና ገጽታዋን ለመገንባት እንደ መጠቀሚያ ተጠቅማበታለች። የቬንዙዌላ መንግስት ቡድኑን በይፋ ቢያመሰግንም፣ ተንታኞች ይህ እንቅስቃሴ በፖሊሲ ለውጥ ከመመራት ይልቅ እስራኤል በዓለም አቀፍ ደረጃ የተገለለችበትን ሁኔታ ለመቀየር የተደረገ ዲፕሎማሲያዊ ስልት እንደሆነ ይገልጻሉ።
oromo: Biyya Veenzuweela keessatti sochiin lafaa cimaan lubbuu namoota 5,000 ol erga galaafatee booda, Israa'el bara 2009 irraa eegalee hariiroo diippilomaasii kan hin qabne taatus garee gargaarsaa ergiteetti. Qeeqtonni akka jedhanitti, Israa'el gargaarsa kana kan fayyadamte waraana Gaazaatiin walqabatee qeeqqa addunyaa irratti ishee qunname hir'isuuf fi suuraa ishee fooyyeffachuuf akka ta'e dubbatu. Mootummaan Veenzuweela garee Israa'el kana erga galateeffatee booda, qaamoleen gargaaran kun sochii kana kan godhan jijjiirama siyaasaatiif osoo hin taane, Israa'el addunyaa irraa adda baatee jirtu sana keessaa bahuuf mala diippilomaasii akka fayyadamte ibsu.

title: Israeli ministers lead mass Al-Aqsa Mosque raid
english: Israeli government ministers and thousands of ultranationalists entered the Al-Aqsa Mosque complex in East Jerusalem under police protection, marking a significant breach of the site's long-standing religious status quo. Palestinian authorities strongly condemned the move, which occurred during the Jewish fast of Tisha B'Av, as a provocative violation of Islamic sanctity. During the event, many Palestinians were prevented from accessing the site for prayers, leading to widespread concerns regarding the potential for further regional instability.
amharic: የእስራኤል ሚኒስትሮች እና በሺዎች የሚቆጠሩ አክራሪ አይሁዳውያን በፖሊስ ታጅበው ወደ ምስራቅ እየሩሳሌም የአል-አቅሳ መስጊድ ግቢ በመግባት ለረጅም ጊዜ የቆየውን የሃይማኖታዊ ስፍራ አሰራር ጥሰዋል። የፍልስጤም ባለስልጣናት ይህ ድርጊት በቲሻ ቤአቭ የጾም ወቅት የተፈጸመ እና የእስልምና እምነት ተከታዮችን ስሜት የሚጎዳ ትንኮሳ ነው ሲሉ አውግዘዋል። በዚህ ወቅት ብዙ ፍልስጤማውያን ወደ መስጊዱ እንዳይገቡ በመከልከላቸው በክልሉ ውስጥ ያለውን ውጥረት አባብሶታል።
oromo: Ministiroonni mootummaa Israa'el fi kumaatamaan lakkaa'aman kanneen garmalee hammatan, eegumsa poolisiin gara masjiida Al-Aqsa kan magaalaa Yerusaalem bahaa seenuun, sirna iddoo kanaa duraan ture darbaniiru. Abbootiin taayitaa Falasxiin gocha kana kan balaaleffatan yoo ta'u, kunis guyyaa soomaa Yihuudotaa kan Tisha B'Av irratti raawwatamuun, kabaja iddoo amantii Islaamaa tuquu fi kakka'umsa ta'uu ibsaniiru. Yeroo kana Falasxiinonni hedduun salaataaf iddoo kana akka hin geenye dhorkamuun isaanii, naannichatti soda fi walitti bu'iinsa uumuu danda'uuf madda ta'eera.

title: Wave of US attacks target Iran for 12th night in a row, two killed in Shalamcheh
english: For the twelfth night in a row, the United States launched a series of airstrikes against various locations in Iran. A strike at the Shalamcheh border crossing resulted in at least two deaths and left eleven individuals injured. Additional military attacks were also reported in several other Iranian cities including Bushehr, Ahvaz, and Andimeshk.
amharic: አሜሪካ ለተከታታይ አሥራ ሁለት ምሽቶች ኢራን ውስጥ በተለያዩ ቦታዎች ላይ የአየር ጥቃት ሰንዝራለች። በሻላምቼ የድንበር መተላለፊያ ላይ በተፈጸመ ጥቃት ቢያንስ ሁለት ሰዎች ሲሞቱ ሌሎች አሥራ አንድ ሰዎች ቆስለዋል። እንደ ቡሼር፣ አህዋዝ እና አንዲሜሽክ ባሉ ሌሎች የኢራን ከተሞችም ተመሳሳይ ወታደራዊ ጥቃቶች መፈጸማቸው ተዘግቧል።
oromo: Ameerikaan galgala kudha lamaaf walitti aansuun bakkeewwan garagaraa biyya Iraan keessatti haleellaa qilleensa irraa raawwatteetti. Haleellaa daangaa Shalamcheh irratti gaggeeffameen namoonni lama yoo du'an, kudha tokko immoo madaa'aniiru. Magaalota Iraan kan biroo akka Bushehr, Ahvaz fi Andimeshk keessattis haleellaawwan waraanaa raawwatamuu gabaafameera.

title: Will the war on Iran affect ASEAN’s efforts to tackle regional issues?
english: Foreign ministers from Southeast Asia are meeting in Manila to discuss critical regional challenges like the conflict in Myanmar and South China Sea disputes. However, the ongoing hostilities between the United States and Iran have become a major distraction, raising concerns about energy, food security, and global economic stability. There are growing worries that this international crisis will hinder ASEAN's ability to focus on and effectively resolve its own internal security issues.
amharic: የደቡብ ምስራቅ እስያ የውጭ ጉዳይ ሚኒስትሮች እንደ ምያንማር የእርስ በእርስ ጦርነት እና የደቡብ ቻይና ባህር ግጭቶችን የመሳሰሉ ክልላዊ ጉዳዮችን ለመወያየት በማኒላ ተሰብስበዋል። ይሁን እንጂ በአሜሪካ እና በኢራን መካከል የተቀሰቀሰው ግጭት ለስብሰባው ትልቅ እንቅፋት ሆኗል፤ ይህም በኢነርጂ፣ በምግብ አቅርቦት እና በአለም አቀፍ ኢኮኖሚ ላይ ስጋት ፈጥሯል። ይህ አለም አቀፍ ቀውስ የደቡብ ምስራቅ እስያ ሀገራት ማህበር (ASEAN) የራሱን ክልላዊ የደህንነት ጉዳዮች ለመፍታት የሚያደርገውን ጥረት ያደናቅፋል ተብሎ ተሰግቷል።
oromo: Ministiroonni dhimma alaa biyyoota Kibba-baha Eeshiyaa dhimmoota naannawaa kanneen akka waraana biyya Miyaanmaar fi wal-dhabdee garba Chaayinaa Kibbaa irratti mari'achuuf Maanilaatti walga'aniiru. Ta'us, wal-dhabdeen gidduu Ameerikaa fi Iiraan uumame xiyyeeffannoo walga'ichaa fudhachuu isaatiin walqabatee, dhiyeessii anniisaa, nyaataa fi tasgabbii dinagdee addunyaa irratti soda uumeera. Dhimmi idil-addunyaa kun gamtaan ASEAN dhimmoota nageenya naannoo isaa irratti xiyyeeffachuu fi furmaata kennuuf carraaqqii inni taasisu irratti dhiibbaa geessisa jedhamee sodaatama.

title: Thousands forced to evacuate as wildfires sweep across southern France
english: Massive wildfires in southern France have triggered large-scale evacuations as emergency teams work to contain the flames. Experts attribute the severity of these fires to climate change, which is causing harsher heatwaves and drier conditions. These factors are leading to more dangerous and frequent fire seasons throughout the European region.
amharic: በደቡባዊ ፈረንሳይ የተቀሰቀሰው ከፍተኛ የእሳት አደጋ በሺዎች የሚቆጠሩ ሰዎችን ከመኖሪያቸው እንዲፈናቀሉ አስገድዷል። የእሳት አደጋ መከላከል ቡድኖች እሳቱን ለመቆጣጠር ከፍተኛ ጥረት እያደረጉ ይገኛሉ። ባለሙያዎች እንደሚናገሩት፣ በአየር ንብረት ለውጥ ምክንያት እየጨመረ የመጣው ሙቀትና ድርቅ በየጊዜው የሚከሰቱ የእሳት አደጋዎችን ይበልጥ አደገኛ እያደረጋቸው ነው።
oromo: Fayyaan bosonaa kibba Faransaayitti ka'e namoota kumaatamaan lakka'aman bakka jireenya isaanii irraa akka godaanan dirqisiiseera. Gareen gargaarsa hatattamaa ibidda kana dhaamsuuf carraaqqii cimaa gochaa jiru. Hayyoonni akka ibsanitti, jijjiiramni qilleensaa kutaalee Awurooppaa keessatti huubaa fi hongee hammaataa uumuun, ibidda bosonaa akkaan hamaa fi miidhaa geessisu ta'uun isaa ibsameera.
